layout.description: Generate, auto-evaluate, and commit agent portrait truth in controlled batches.

batchList.heroTitle: Portrait truth moves in batches, not drafts.
batchList.heroDescription: Define one world style lane, freeze capture selection, let the runtime generate and gate outputs, then explicitly commit passed portraits back into Realm truth.
batchList.emptyDescription: Start by freezing a world slice or an explicit set of agents into one batch.
batchList.emptyFilteredDescription: Switch the status filter or open the creator to launch a new batch.

createBatch.title: Define one world style lane, then freeze one batch.
createBatch.selectionByWorldDescription: Use one world as the batch lane and inherit one shared style pack.
createBatch.selectionExplicitDescription: Manually choose agents, but the final batch must still resolve to one world.
createBatch.worldCastUnavailable: Lookdev could not resolve a controllable cast for {{worldName}}. Pick a world you can operate on or refresh runtime and try again.
createBatch.multiWorldWarning: Selected agents currently span multiple worlds. Narrow to one world before creating a batch.
createBatch.intakeLoading: Loading world and agent intake data before batch freeze…
createBatch.intakeUnavailable: Lookdev could not load the current world or agent intake data. Refresh runtime and try again.
createBatch.worldStylePackDescription: Reusable working state for {{worldName}}. This stays in Lookdev and does not become Realm truth.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionDescription: Use natural dialogue to converge the portrait lane for {{worldName}}. Lookdev should understand, summarize, and tighten the direction with you instead of walking through a rigid questionnaire.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionTargetReady: This config controls the dialogue route, meaning the connector + model used for chat. Lookdev uses it to understand the world-style conversation and synthesize a draft style pack.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionTargetMissing: Lookdev cannot run understanding-style dialogue until a text.generate target is available in runtime readiness.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionPendingWorld: Pick a world first and this lane's style conversation will expand below. You can confirm the dialogue route here ahead of time.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionInputDescription: Talk to Lookdev the way you would brief a creative partner. You can describe tone, lane boundaries, or examples, and Lookdev should keep consolidating the world style direction.
createBatch.worldStyleSessionInputPlaceholder: For example: keep the lane grounded and readable, let costumes carry hierarchy, and never let the background overpower the character…
createBatch.stylePackDraftDescription: This style pack is still a draft candidate. Confirm it before Lookdev compiles portrait briefs or unlocks capture.
createBatch.stylePackConfirmedDescription: This style pack is confirmed for downstream brief compilation and capture refinement. Editing any field will return it to draft.
createBatch.stylePackSeedLocalizedTemplate: Source: Lookdev localized seed draft. It is a candidate, not formal truth.
createBatch.stylePackSeedStored: Source: previously saved Lookdev style pack.
createBatch.advancedStyleEditorDescription: Conversation is the primary input. Use the structured editor only when you want to fine-tune specific fields.
createBatch.captureSelectionDescription: Default = primary agents. User is the authority.
createBatch.captureSelectionBlocked: Confirm the world style pack first. Capture selection only opens after the style lane is explicitly confirmed.
createBatch.captureSelectionEmpty: Select agents first to configure capture selection.
createBatch.embeddedCaptureDescription: After capture selection is set, selected capture agents get an in-place brief refinement step inside Lookdev. Edits are saved in Lookdev and reused across later batches.
createBatch.embeddedCaptureBlocked: Confirm the world style pack first. Embedded capture only opens after Lookdev can compile portrait briefs from a confirmed style lane.
createBatch.embeddedCaptureEmpty: No capture agents selected. Keep everything in batch-only mode, or select agents above to open embedded capture refinement.
createBatch.policyTitle: Configure dialogue, image generation, and evaluation separately.
createBatch.policyTargetMap: The dialogue route lives in the World Style Session on the left. This panel only controls the image route and the evaluation route.
createBatch.generationTargetDescription: This is the route that actually renders portraits, meaning the image.generate connector + model.
createBatch.evaluationTargetDescription: This is the route that automatically reviews and scores generated portraits, meaning the text.generate.vision connector + model.
createBatch.policyNotesStylePack: Style pack and portrait briefs are Lookdev-local working state and can be reused across batches.
createBatch.policyNotesCaptureSelection: Capture selection is user-owned and defaults to primary agents.
createBatch.policyNotesWriteback: Writeback still commits only passed and not-yet-committed items to Realm `AGENT_PORTRAIT`.
createBatch.errorIntakeLoading: World and agent intake data is still loading.
createBatch.errorIntakeUnavailable: World and agent intake data is unavailable right now.
createBatch.errorWorldCastUnavailable: Lookdev could not resolve a controllable cast for {{worldName}}.
createBatch.errorAgentsRequired: Select at least one world-backed agent.
createBatch.errorSingleWorldRequired: One batch can only target one world style lane. Narrow the selection to one world.
createBatch.errorWorldRequired: Select one world before creating a batch.
createBatch.errorStylePackConfirmationRequired: Confirm the world style pack before creating a batch.
createBatch.errorStyleSessionReplyRequired: Write at least one world-style note before sending it to Lookdev.
createBatch.errorStyleSessionTargetRequired: Lookdev needs one text.generate target before it can run understanding-style world dialogue.
createBatch.errorStyleSessionTruncated: The world-style dialogue response was truncated. Try again or tighten the request.
createBatch.errorStyleSessionResponseInvalid: Lookdev received an invalid dialogue response from runtime. Try again or switch runtime target.
createBatch.errorStyleSessionInputRequired: Talk through the world style at least once before synthesizing the style pack.
createBatch.errorStylePackSynthesisInvalid: Lookdev could not turn the conversation into a valid style pack draft. Continue the dialogue or try again.
createBatch.errorGenerationTargetRequired: Select an image.generate target before creating a batch.
createBatch.errorEvaluationTargetRequired: Select a text.generate.vision target before creating a batch.

batchDetail.noConcept: No concept text was provided by the current Realm agent record.
batchDetail.invalidSnapshotDescription: This batch was created against an outdated local schema. Recreate the batch from the current Lookdev flow.
